title: aster spathulatus var. intermedius
intro: Aster spathulatus var. intermedius, also known as the Intermediate White Prairie Clover or Intermediate White Clover, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and trifoliate leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Aster spathulatus var. intermedius include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. This plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
